question:
Will Al Fateh Saudi Club vs. Al Taawoun Saudi Club end in a draw?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 7, 2025
If the game ends in a draw, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve to "Yes".

Resolution source: https://www.slstat.com/

evidences.title: Saudi football league system — Grokipedia
evidences.content: directly to the group stage and the third-placed team entering the playoff round, contingent on Saudi Arabia's continental coefficient. Al-Hilal dominates the historical landscape with a record 19 top-division titles, including their undefeated 2023–24 campaign. Al-Ittihad won the 2024–25 title, ending Al-Hilal's recent dominance.(#ref-37)](#ref-37)(#ref-19)](#ref-19) The league's competitive dynamics have been elevated by the influx of high-profile foreign talent, facilitated by regulatory adjustments allowing up to 10 non-Saudi players per squad since the 2024–25 season, including at least two from Asia. This policy has enabled marquee signings, such as Cristiano Ronaldo's 2023 move to Al-Nassr, where he shattered the single-season scoring record with 35 goals in 2023–24 and propelled [...] In the men's system, promotion and relegation operate through a combination of direct placements and playoff matches to ensure fluidity and competitiveness across the pyramid, which encompasses approximately 146 teams in total. The Saudi Arabian Football Federation (SAFF) oversees these mechanics via its Competition & Tournament Regulations, which outline the processes for all divisions fol...

evidences.content: ): League Regulations and Governance Structures Table 1 [...] Thus, the results show that the implementation of the Saudi Vision 2030 programme has been a significant boost for football in Saudi Arabia in its bid to turn the SPL into a global benchmark. The SPL has led the AFC Club Competitions Ranking for the fourth consecutive season since 2021–22, achieving an estimated score of approximately 119.96 points in the 2024–25 edition, surpassing traditionally stronger Asian leagues such as those of Japan and South Korea3 (60) In this sense, the plan is working in attracting international talent and increasing the League's visibility, but there is a risk of increasing the League's polarisation between a few teams that have access to these international players and the rest. Football is one of the few industries in which competition incentivises the [...] Summary of competitive balance factors in the Saudi professional league (SPL). Source: Author elaboration. evidences.title: Cristiano Ronaldo’s influence could trigger historic Saudi Pro League rule change as three new foreign player proposals emerge - World Soccer Talk
evidences.content: Eight foreign players can be senior internationals without age restrictions, while two additional foreign spots are reserved for players born in 2003 or later. Clubs may also register one foreign-born player who was born inside Saudi Arabia and meets specific eligibility criteria. Cristiano Ronaldo of Al-Nassr celebrates with teammate Kingsley Coman. Cristiano Ronaldo of Al-Nassr celebrates with teammate Kingsley Coman. Advertisement Advertisement On matchdays, teams are currently allowed to field eight foreign players plus one Saudi-born foreign player. That means a maximum of nine non-Saudi players can appear during league matches under existing regulations.
